name: Melodious Fusion
desc:
When this card is activated: Fusion Summon 1 "Melodious" Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, by shuffling its Fusion Materials from your GY, your banishment, and/or your Pendulum Zones into the Deck or Extra Deck.
When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can negate that activation, and if you do, destroy that card.
If you activated this effect, the next time you activate the effect of a "Melodious" monster this turn, after that effect resolves, banish 3 "Melodious" monsters you control; otherwise, negate that effect.
